title: Goldn's Better GUI
description: This Makes The Hotbar Look Cooler
body:
(THIS PACK REQUIRES TRANLUCENCY FIX FOR OVER 1.2 VERSIONS OF THE PACK https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/translucencyfix )

This is a resource pack that make the gui look much better
(REMINDER THIS IS IN BETA AND THINGS ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE)
The Thumbnail Is Outdated And Will Be Updated Soon

Currently Includes
Buttons
Hotbar
Bossbars
Most GUI's
